get.description: Return all accounts that belong to the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Accounts Endpoint Api V1 Accounts  Get

post.description: Create an account linked to a bank owned by the current user.

post.description: Authenticate user, set cookie, and return access token payload.
Invalidate the current access token so it cannot be reused after logout.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile fields.

post.description: Validate refresh token and issue a new access token payload.
Register a new user with hashed password.

delete.description: Delete a transaction and reverse its balance effect.

get.description: Return lightweight liveness payload for health probes.

Readiness probe: verifica conectividad real con la BD.

Diferencia clave vs `/health`:
- liveness (/health): ¿el proceso responde? Si falla, k8s reinicia el pod.
- readiness (/ready): ¿puede atender tráfico? Si falla, k8s lo saca del LB.
